rows.command_kor: 녹음기가 녹음중이면 녹음을 중지하고 test.mp3로 저장해줘. 녹음중이 아니면 녹음을 시작해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the audio recorder is recording, stop recording and save as test.mp3; otherwise, start recording.

rows.command_kor: 충전 전압이 220볼트 이상이면, 충전을 멈춰줘.
rows.command_eng: Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.

rows.command_kor: 클라우드 서비스가 활성화되어있으면, test.png 파일을 클라우드에 업로드해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.

rows.command_kor: 오븐이 그릴 모드이면, 시간을 4분 더 추가해줘
rows.command_eng: If the oven is in grill mode, add 4 more minutes.

rows.command_kor: 밥솥이 보온 모드이면, 조리 모드로 변경해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the rice cooker is on keep-warm mode, switch it to cooking mode.

rows.command_kor: 오늘이 공휴일이면 "test@example.com"으로 "오늘은 공휴일입니다."라는 내용을 "공휴일" 제목으로 이메일을 보내줘.
rows.command_eng: If today is holiday, send an email to "test@example.com" with the subject "Holiday" and the message "Today is holiday.".

rows.command_kor: 바깥의 초미세먼지 농도가 15 이상이면, 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: If the outdoor very fine dust level is 15 or higher, sound the emergency siren.

rows.command_kor: 충전기의 전류가 10암페어 이상이면, 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: If the charger current is 10 amperes or above, sound the emergency siren.

rows.command_kor: 펌프가 노말 모드이면 맥시멈 모드로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the pump is in normal mode, set it to maximum mode.

rows.command_kor: 스피커가 재생중이면, 멈춰줘.
rows.command_eng: If the speaker is playing, stop it.

rows.command_kor: 건조기가 저소음 모드이면, 퀵 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: If the laundry dryer is in low noise mode, switch it to quick mode.

rows.command_kor: 건조기 회전 강도가 3보다 크면 하나 줄이고, 아니면 하나 높여줘.
rows.command_eng: If the laundry dryer spin speed is greater than 3, decrease it by one; otherwise, increase it by one.

rows.command_kor: 충전기가 완충되어있으면, 충전기를 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: If the charger is fully charged, turn off the charger.

rows.command_kor: 버튼이 눌려진 상태면, 블라인드를 올려줘.
rows.command_eng: If the button is in the pushed state, raise the blind.

rows.command_kor: 스피커 볼륨이 40 이상이면 재생을 중단해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the speaker volume is 40 or higher, stop the playback.

rows.command_kor: 입구의 얼굴 인식이 꺼져있으면, 얼굴 인식을 시작해줘
rows.command_eng: If face recognition at the entrance is off, start it.

rows.command_kor: 쉐이드가 30%이하로 닫혀있으면, 50%만큼 닫아줘.
rows.command_eng: If the shade is closed to 30% or less, close it to 50%.

rows.command_kor: 거실의 소리 센서로 감지한 수치가 50보다 크면, 스피커 재생을 멈춰줘.
rows.command_eng: If the sound sensor level in livingroom is over 50, stop the speaker.

rows.command_kor: 거실의 에어컨 모드가 냉방 모드이면, 자동 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: If the air conditioner is in cool mode, switch it to auto mode.

rows.command_kor: 집에 있는 재실 센서중 하나라도 감지 상태이면, 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: If any presence sensor in the house is currently in the detected state, set the siren to emergency mode.

rows.command_kor: 입구의 접촉 센서가 감지 상태이면, 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: If the contact sensor at the entrance is in detected state, sound the emergency siren.

rows.command_kor: 지금 비가 오고 있으면, 집안의 모든 제습기를 건조 모드로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: If it is raining, set all dehumidifiers in the house to drying mode.

rows.command_kor: 거실 조도가 200 럭스 이상이면, 거실 불을 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: If the livingroom brightness is 200 lux or higher, turn off the livingroom light.

rows.command_kor: 구역1의 온도가 36.5도 이상이면, 에어컨을 30도로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the temperature is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the target temperature to 30.

rows.command_kor: 농장의 이산화탄소 농도가 800ppm 이상이면, 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: If the carbon dioxide concentration in the farm is 800ppm or higher, sound the emergency siren.

rows.command_kor: 회의실 온도가 20도 미만이면, 회의실 문을 닫아줘.
rows.command_eng: If the temperature on the airquality sensor is below 20 degrees, close the door.

rows.command_kor: 회의실 조명이 꺼져 있으면, 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: If the light in the meeting room is off, turn it on.

rows.command_kor: 안방 온도가 36.5도 이상이면, 에어컨을 30도로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the temperature in the bedroom is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the bedroom air conditioner to 30 degrees.

rows.command_kor: 거실에 움직임이 감지되고 있으면, 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: If motion is being detected in the living room, turn on the living room light.

rows.command_kor: 연구실 습도가 50 이상이면 제습기를 켜고 50 미만이면 가습기를 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: If the lab humidity is 50 or higher, turn on the dehumidifier, and if it's below 50, turn on the humidifier.

failed_cases.command_eng: Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.
If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.
If the oven is in grill mode, add 4 more minutes.
If the button is in the pushed state, raise the blind.
If face recognition at the entrance is off, start it.
If the shade is closed to 30% or less, close it to 50%.
If the sound sensor level in livingroom is over 50, stop the speaker.
If the air conditioner is in cool mode, switch it to auto mode.
If any presence sensor in the house is currently in the detected state, set the siren to emergency mode.
If the contact sensor at the entrance is in detected state, sound the emergency siren.
If it is raining, set all dehumidifiers in the house to drying mode.
If the livingroom brightness is 200 lux or higher, turn off the livingroom light.
If the temperature is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the target temperature to 30.
If the carbon dioxide concentration in the farm is 800ppm or higher, sound the emergency siren.
If the temperature on the airquality sensor is below 20 degrees, close the door.
If the light in the meeting room is off, turn it on.
If the temperature in the bedroom is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the bedroom air conditioner to 30 degrees.
If motion is being detected in the living room, turn on the living room light.
If the lab humidity is 50 or higher, turn on the dehumidifier, and if it's below 50, turn on the humidifier.
